author: Aaron Beavers
name: Local RTX 4070 SP1024 8x512 KV4 seq768 500-step run
blurb: Non-record local consumer-GPU track: SP-1024 8x512 with KV4, seq_len=768, higher tied-embed and matrix learning rates on 1x RTX 4070 Laptop GPU; trained for 500 steps on one published train shard and evaluated on the full published validation split; final int8+zlib roundtrip scored 1.61140740 under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
